title: Floral Tender American Avocado Salad
description: A fresh, floral-infused salad blending creamy avocado, crisp apple, and delicate blanched herbs, finished with a warm applesauce drizzle and a hint of citrus. Perfect for adventurous diners craving a sweet‑savory, upside‑down meal.
instructions: Bring a small pot of salted water to a rolling boil.
Add the basil leaves and blanch for 10–15 seconds, then transfer immediately to an ice bath to halt cooking.
Drain the basil, pat dry, and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine diced avocado, apple, cucumber, and red onion.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, honey, a pinch of salt, and pepper.
Add the blanched basil and slivered almonds to the salad and gently toss.
Pour the vinaigrette over the salad and toss until evenly coated.
Warm the applesauce slightly (about 30 seconds in a microwave) and drizzle over the salad, letting it melt into the mix.
Garnish with extra basil and a sprinkle of pepper if desired.
Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to 30 minutes before serving.
